prompt: Calibra el entorno Scriba. Detecta todos los documentos disponibles y dime en que nivel de priming estamos.
expected_behavior: Scans working directory recursively for all document types
Classifies documents by type (PDF, HTML, MD, images, Word)
Checks for existing session-state.json and calibration-digest.md
Generates calibration report with document counts and domain coverage

prompt: Reanuda la sesion anterior. Necesito saber en que fase quedamos y que documentos tenemos disponibles.
expected_behavior: Reads session-state.json to restore previous session
Reads calibration-digest.md for previous priming level
Detects any new documents added since last session
Reports restored state including active phase and gates passed
Recalculates calibration level if new documents found

prompt: Environment check — I just added 4 new PDF files to the directory. What's my calibration level now?
expected_behavior: Reports delta: what changed since last calibration
